Event: Knightly Challenge
Event Date: 01/06/2021
Sage Bot Item Code: A39


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
Excalibur

Triggers: When battle starts

The artifact wearer has their health gradually increased by 35% over 4 sec. Then, they become worthy and release the power of the king. A powerful explosion goes off, dealing 20000 damage within a large radius. Then, all enemies are unable to use their weapon abilities for 2 sec.

Requirements: 90-100
